descriptions: Black Gaza lists 6th/ACG as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: GGE, 6th/ACG, PRLane

descriptions: The Apaches were bitter enemies of South Brooklyn Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Also bitter enemies of SBB were the Puerto Rican Gangs, The Untouchable Bishops, and the Apaches, and the African American gangs The Mau Maus, and the Chaplains.

Taishu-kai.description: The Taishu-kai is a yakuza organization based in Fukuoka Prefecture, Japan, with an estimated 60 active members. It was formed around 1954 by Kuniharu Ota as the Ota Group, later renamed Ota-gumi, and finally Taishu-kai in 1973. It is one of five independent Fukuoka-based designated yakuza syndicates and a member of the anti-Yamaguchi-gumi federation Yonsha-kai.

descriptions: Dojin-kai is allied with Taishu-kai as per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Kudo-kai, Sinaloa cartel, Taishu-kai, Kumamoto-kai)

descriptions: Kudo-kai and Taishu-kai are both members of the Yonsha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kudo-kai is a member of an anti-Yamaguchi fraternal federation, the Yonsha-kai, with three other northern-Kyushu based organizations, the Taishu-kai , Dojin-kai , and Kumamoto-kai.

descriptions: Taishu-kai and Dojin-kai are both members of the Yonsha-kai federation, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Taishu-kai is a member of an anti-Yamaguchi-gumi fraternal federation, the "Yonsha-kai", along with the Kitakyushu -based Kudo-kai , the Kurume -based Dojin-kai and the Kumamoto -based Kumamoto-kai.

descriptions: Taishu-kai and Kudo-kai are both members of the Yonsha-kai federation, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Taishu-kai is a member of an anti-Yamaguchi-gumi fraternal federation, the "Yonsha-kai", along with the Kitakyushu -based Kudo-kai , the Kurume -based Dojin-kai and the Kumamoto -based Kumamoto-kai.

descriptions: Taishu-kai and Kumamoto-kai are both members of the Yonsha-kai federation, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Taishu-kai is a member of an anti-Yamaguchi-gumi fraternal federation, the "Yonsha-kai", along with the Kitakyushu -based Kudo-kai , the Kurume -based Dojin-kai and the Kumamoto -based Kumamoto-kai.

descriptions: Taishu-kai is part of a federation that opposes the Yamaguchi-gumi, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The Taishu-kai is a member of an anti-Yamaguchi-gumi fraternal federation, the "Yonsha-kai"

Fuerza Anti-Unión.description: Mexican criminal organization originating from the Tepito neighborhood of Mexico City, founded around 2016. It emerged either as a self-defense group against the Unión Tepito or as a splinter faction led by Roberto Moyado. Engages in extortion, kidnapping, drug trafficking, and murder. Despite arrests of key leaders, the group remains active.

descriptions: Infobox lists Fuerza Anti-Unión as an ally of CJNG.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cártel de Tijuana, Cártel del Golfo, Los Metros, Los Chapitos, Los Viagras, Cártel de Caborca, Fuerza Anti-Unión, Los Lobos

descriptions: Fuerza Anti-Unión is listed as an ally of Cártel de Tláhuac in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: CJNG , Fuerza Anti-Unión , La Familia Michoacana , Células delictivas locales y de menor importancia como La Ronda 88 y Los Guerreros

descriptions: CJNG is listed as an ally of Fuerza Anti-Unión in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cártel de Jalisco Nueva Generación

descriptions: Cártel de Tláhuac is listed as an enemy of Fuerza Anti-Unión in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Cártel de Tláhuac

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana is listed as an enemy of Fuerza Anti-Unión in the infobox.

descriptions: Fuerza Anti-Unión formed from splinter of Unión Tepito, leading to competition for territory.
edges.evidence_quote: varios miembros de la organización se separaron para formar la Fuerza Anti Unión, lo que orillo la competencia de ambos grupos por el control del territorio

descriptions: Fuerza Anti-Unión is a splinter group that broke away from La Unión Tepito in 2016 due to a murder and kidnapping ordered by La Unión Tepito's leader.
edges.evidence_quote: Fuerza Anti-Unión (a notorious splinter group from La Unión Tepito who broke away from them in 2016 after the founder of Fuerza Anti-Unión, Jorge Flores Concha (aka "El Tortas") had one of his brothers murdered at the behest of "El Betito" (the leader of La Unión Tepito at the time of the crime) and the other kidnapped).

descriptions: Unión Tepito considers Fuerza Anti-Unión an enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Fuerza Anti-Unión

descriptions: Infobox lists Fuerza Anti-Unión as an enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Fuerza Anti-Unión

descriptions: Fuerza Anti-Unión is listed as a rival of Tren de Aragua in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Fuerza Anti-Unión , Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: El infobox lista a Fuerza Anti-Unión como enemiga del Tren de Aragua.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Fuerza Anti-Unión

descriptions: Sendero Rojo was a faction that rejected Guzmán's peace treaty and collapsed, leading to MPCP's formation.
edges.evidence_quote: the Militarized Communist Party of Peru (MPCP) is considered the group's main successor, founded in 1999 by brothers Víctor and Jorge Quispe Palomino after the collapse of Sendero Rojo , the faction that had rejected Guzmán's peace treaty.

descriptions: Sendero Rojo is a splinter faction that broke away from Shining Path.
edges.evidence_quote: Guzmán's role as the leader of the Shining Path was taken over by Óscar Ramírez ("Comrade Feliciano"), who established Sendero Rojo (or PCP Pro-Seguir), aiming to reorganise the party and to continue the armed struggle while breaking with Guzmán, but not with his ideology.

descriptions: Norte-14 is listed as a rival of Toonerville Rifa 13.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Armenian Power , The Avenues , Westside Locos The Rascals, Frogtown Rifa , Vineland Boys , MS-13 , Russian mafia , Norte-14

descriptions: East Coast Crips severed alliance with Crips after Washington's death.
edges.evidence_quote: The East Coast Crips (from East Los Angeles) and the Hoover Crips directly severed their alliance after Washington's death.

descriptions: Florencia 13 ordered killings of East Coast Crips.
edges.evidence_quote: At certain times, Florencia 13 leaders ordered killings of the East Coast Crip gang, according to former Los Angeles County Sheriff Lee Baca .

descriptions: East Coast Crips are listed as former rivals, now allies of Florencia 13 in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Mexican Mafia , Sureños , Pueblo Bishop Bloods , Mad Swan Bloods , Harvard Park Brims , East Coast Crips (Former rivals)

descriptions: East Coast Crips murdered a Grape Street Watts Crips member, sparking a war between the two sets.
edges.evidence_quote: Brandon 'BL' Bullard, a veteran of the Grape Street Watts Crips, was murdered by the East Coast Crips in 2008. The murder of Bullard sparked a war that resulted in 26 wounded and 9 dead in the six weeks that followed.

'Ndrina Comberiati.description: The Comberiati are a 'ndrina (organized crime clan) of the 'Ndrangheta, originating from Petilia Policastro, Calabria, Italy. They are allied with the Coco-Trovato clan and have controlled neighborhoods in Milan, particularly Quarto Oggiaro. The clan has been involved in multiple murders, including the 2009 killing of witness Lea Garofalo. Key members include boss Vincenzo Comberiati, arrested and sentenced to 41-bis solitary confinement.

descriptions: Comberiati together with Carvelli controlled neighborhoods in Milan.
edges.evidence_quote: insieme alla famiglia Carvelli avrebbero controllato alcuni quartieri di Milano

descriptions: Comberiati are allies of Coco-Trovato.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Coco-Trovato

Somali Outlaws.description: The Somali Outlaws are a Somali American street gang based in the Minneapolis–Saint Paul metropolitan area, active since the 2000s. The gang operates primarily around the Karmel Mall in south Minneapolis and the Cedar-Riverside neighborhood, with additional territory in Saint Paul and Nashville. Their activities include drug trafficking and human trafficking. The gang's leader, Mustafa Ali, was killed in 2019.

descriptions: Somali Outlaws and 1627 Boys are rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hot Boyz , Madhiban With Attitude , 1627 Boys

descriptions: Somali Outlaws and East African Posse are allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: East African Posse

descriptions: Somali Outlaws and Hot Boyz are rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hot Boyz , Madhiban With Attitude , 1627 Boys

descriptions: Somali Outlaws and Madhiban With Attitude are rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hot Boyz , Madhiban With Attitude , 1627 Boys

descriptions: Aston Villa Hardcore fought with Kop of Boulogne in a street fight.
edges.evidence_quote: members of the Hardcore took part in a street fight with PSG's Kop of Boulogne (KoB) hooligan firm outside a bar in the Pigalle district of Paris.

descriptions: Hard Livings has associations with Varador Cortet.
edges.evidence_quote: They have associations with Westbury gang, Varador Cortet.

descriptions: Los Correa is listed as a rival of CJNG in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sinaloa Cartel , Tijuana Cartel , Santa Rosa de Lima Cartel , Los Viagras , Cárteles Unidos , Autodefensas , Nueva Plaza Cartel , Knights Templar Cartel , La Familia Michoacana , Cártel del Noreste , La Unión Tepito , Los Zetas , Zetas Vieja Escuela , Barrio Azteca (current status unknown) , Los Correa , Cartel del Abuelo , Grupo Sombra , Gente Nueva , La Nueva Familia Michoacana

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: La Familia Michoacana , Los Viagras , La Nueva Familia Michoacana , Los Blancos de Troya , Los Correa

descriptions: Grudge Bringers killed Bandidos president in retaliation for a fight.
edges.evidence_quote: Shane "Wock" De Britt, president of the Bandidos' Central West chapter based in Molong , was fatally shot in the head with a 12-gauge Franchi shotgun at his home in Eurimbla in retaliation after members of the Wellington -based Grudge Bringers gang were beaten and robbed of their gang " colours " during a fight with Bandidos.

110ers.description: The 110ers are a violent criminal organization based in New Orleans, Louisiana, operating primarily in the 10th and 11th Wards. Founded in the 2000s, the gang is involved in drug trafficking, murder, theft, and kidnapping. They have been under federal investigation since 2010 and were indicted in 2013 for multiple killings, including the death of a child. The gang has feuded with rival groups such as the Young Melph Mafia and Ride or Die Gang.

descriptions: The 39ers gang is listed as a rival of the 110ers Gang in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Ride or Die Gang , Young Melph Mafia , 39ers gang

descriptions: The 110ers Gang feuds with the Ride or Die Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: In recent years the gang have been known to feud with the Young Melph Mafia and the Ride or Die Gang from the 8th Ward of New Orleans.

descriptions: The 110ers Gang feuds with the Young Melph Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: In recent years the gang have been known to feud with the Young Melph Mafia and the Ride or Die Gang from the 8th Ward of New Orleans.

descriptions: 110ers is listed as a rival of 39ers gang in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 110ers
